mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId , TOKEN AS token , EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt , CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO REFRESH_TOKEN T USING (SELECT #{memberId} AS MEMBER_ID FROM DUAL) S ON (T.MEMBER_ID = S.MEMBER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TOKEN = #{token} , EXPIRES_AT = #{expiresAt} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEMBER_ID, TOKEN, EXPIRES_AT) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt})
